Introduction:

ROCm is a high-performance computing (HPC) software stack that provides optimized performance for various applications, including machine learning (ML), deep learning, and artificial intelligence (AI). One of the key components of ROCm is its GPU support, which enables developers to run ML models on GPUs. However, not all GPUs are supported by ROCm, and some devices may have limitations or issues that prevent them from running certain applications
